programme.desc: Jim fears that Cheryl's romantic expectations will increase as Ryan (Mitch Rouse) showers Dana with gifts, until he learns a secret about a special tape Cheryl may have made.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam can't stop being overprotective when Kate is asked out on her first date; Lowell helps Don buy an anniversary gift for Marcy.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam's parents make an unannounced visit and reveal surprising plans for their future living arrangements.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi finally meet Lowell's wife, Jen, and they are taken by surprise; the tables soon turn when Adam and Andi make a startling realization.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam convinces his stubborn father to finally go to the doctor, he learns a few things his dad didn't want him to know.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: Not just another Sunday in the park with these laughs.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: Serving up a special menu of our favorite pranks.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: Attention shoppers, these gags are hysterical!

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: A living doll; spear fisherman; no smoking.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien
programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: Covers different themes in the search for the best and funniest videos from around the world; includes an entertaining look at relatable moments from real-life home movies.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Hyde's sister, Angie, succumbs to Kelso's charms and agrees to a second date, then wakes up in bed with him.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Fez becomes interested in a hot new client at the salon, but he faces some stiff competition from Kelso.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Brad (Zachery Ty Bryan) throws a Halloween party at home without his parents' (Tim Allen, Patricia Richardson) permission.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim is pressured into standing up to Jill after he buys expensive sports tickets without consulting her.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy (Jonathan Taylor Thomas) won't admit his fears when Jill and Tim (Patricia Richardson, Tim Allen) convert the basement into his bedroom.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Bud makes Tim entertain a station manager during the Taylors' romantic getaway.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob lets Dele get a new haircut and finds himself caught between an irate Abishola and a surprisingly stubborn Dele; Dottie runs into difficulties with the MaxDot board of directors.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.sub-title: Sleeping Next to an Old Boat
programme.desc: Abishola worries that Bob's privileged lifestyle is starting to rub off on Dele; a new robot vacuum brings Tunde joy, but begins to make Olu feel insecure.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Tim and Cindy Devlin crash Gracie's birthday party, they announce that they are getting divorced.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim finds Cheryl a gay friend that she can attend musicals with, so he can escape having to go himself.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Bud gives Boyd a spanking, he's surprised to learn Mike disagrees with his style of discipline; Kyle thinks Mandy's gift of a porkpie hat is an effort to brand him.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy arranges a holiday surprise for the family's housekeeper; Vanessa gives Boyd an elf doll and tells him it's magical.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Vanessa worries Eve will become an outcast after she posts one of Mike's vlogs on her Facebook page; the Baxters have a run-in with the law.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Ryan vehemently disagree when a school counselor suggests that Boyd start ADHD medication; Mandy tries to get good grades.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam sees a kid push Emme, he convinces Teddy to defend his younger sister; Adam and Don persuade Joe to hire a nurse to help him after he has his upcoming knee surgery.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim encourages Gracie and Ruby to open a lemonade stand but does not anticipate fierce competition from a neighbor kid's stand.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tells Ruby's teacher that his wife is illiterate in order to lighten his daughter's homework load.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana falls for a guy exactly like Jim but denies the similarities.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Gracie and Ruby have nightmares after Jim takes them to a scary movie.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim's (Tim Allen) Mother's Day plans for Jill (Patricia Richardson) go awry when he gives away a nostalgic swing set. Guest star: Victoria Principal.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.sub-title: What You See Is What You Get
programme.desc: Tim's (Tim Allen) obvious enjoyment of some breast-enlargement literature leaves Jill (Patricia Richardson) feeling undesirable.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy, pretending to be thirty-two years old, meets a woman on a singles message board on the computer, and she comes by for a visit; Tim tries to help Mark with his science project.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) and Bob Vila face off in a handyman auction and also compete in an auto race. With Bob Vila as himself.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy and Kyle decide to have a home birth -- at Mike and Vanessa's; Ryan and Chuck team up to construct a state-of-the-art crib.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: While Mike is away, Kristin learns what it takes to be in charge at Outdoor Man; Vanessa and Kyle debate how to upgrade the backyard play area and Ryan teaches Mandy how to play chess, but he may be the one getting schooled.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Eve comes home for a visit and struggles to connect with her nieces; Kyle turns to Ed when he worries he isn't dynamic enough in his preaching.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa help Mandy and Kyle with their estate planning but are disappointed with whom they plan to appoint as Sarah's legal guardian; Jen begins working at OutdoorMan and takes advice from Chuck a tad too seriously.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Kitty (Debra Jo Rupp) recruits Red (Kurtwood Smith) and the guys to help out at a church fund-raiser; Fez (Wilmer Valderrama) breaks up with Caroline (guest star Allison Munn). John Ratzenberger and Kevin McDonald guest star.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Fez (Wilmer Valderrama) pretends to date Donna (Laura Prepon) in order to get his psycho ex-girlfriend, Caroline (guest star Allison Munn), off his back.

programme.title: That '70s Show

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Donna parties with band members following a concert and forgets that she left Eric outside waiting for her.

programme.desc: Adam notices his dad's increasingly forgetful behavior and struggles with how to approach him to discuss it.
